title: Bonnie Kerness Interviews Sundiata Acoli
description: Bonnie Kerness interview with Sundiata Acoli at Allenwood Federal Prison on Control Units — their use and psychological effects on political prisoners, POWs, and movement participants. April 27, 1996.

title: Free Herman Bell
description: Free Herman Bell support video.

title: George Jackson — 41-Year Commemoration
description: Commemoration of the 41st anniversary of George Jackson's killing at San Quentin (August 21, 1971).

title: George Jackson — San Quentin Prison (Video Clip)
description: Archival clip of George Jackson at San Quentin State Prison.

title: George Jackson Intro — Prisons on Fire
description: Audio intro to the Freedom Archives' Prisons on Fire production featuring George Jackson.

title: George Jackson on Fascism (Audio)
description: Audio of George Jackson speaking on fascism.

title: George Jackson on Prisoner Unity (We Are All Together)
description: Audio of George Jackson on prisoner unity — "We Are All Together."

title: George Jackson on the Soledad Brothers
description: Audio of George Jackson on the Soledad Brothers case.

title: George Jackson — 30 Years Later
description: Audio reflection on George Jackson three decades after his 1971 killing at San Quentin.

title: Hugo Pinell — Rest in Power (Audio)
description: Tribute to Hugo Pinell, San Quentin 6 / Black Panther Party prisoner killed in August 2015 days after release from solitary at Pelican Bay.

title: Interview with Herman Bell (Audio)
description: Audio interview with BLA / NY 3 political prisoner Herman Bell.

title: Interview with Susan Rosenberg about Conditions in the Lexington Women's Prison (Audio)
description: Audio interview with Susan Rosenberg about conditions in the Lexington High Security Unit for women political prisoners.

title: Jalil Muntaqim — Voice of Liberation
description: Behind-prison-walls discussion with BLA / NY 3 political prisoner Jalil Muntaqim (Anthony Bottom).

title: Leonard Peltier — What Warriors Do
description: Audio of AIM political prisoner Leonard Peltier on "What Warriors Do."

title: Lexington Prison Interviews (1987)
description: May 1987 audio interviews from the Lexington High Security Unit with women political prisoners (Susan Rosenberg, Silvia Baraldini, Alejandrina Torres).

title: Message from Political Prisoners
description: April 23, 1992 audio message from U.S. political prisoners.

title: NPR Report on the Lexington Control Unit (1986)
description: October 1986 NPR report on the Lexington High Security Unit — the federal women's control unit holding Puerto Rican independentista and anti-imperialist prisoners.

title: Nuh Washington — Call Me Nuh
description: Behind-prison-walls discussion with BLA / NY 3 political prisoner Albert Nuh Washington, who died in prison in 2000.

title: Nuh Washington — Last Statement
description: Last statement of BLA / NY 3 political prisoner Albert Nuh Washington.

title: Photograph of Susan Rosenberg, Silvia Baraldini, and Alejandrina Torres (1989)
description: 1989 photograph of three women political prisoners — Susan Rosenberg, Silvia Baraldini, and Alejandrina Torres — held at the Lexington High Security Unit.

title: Ruchell Magee (Audio)
description: Audio of Ruchell "Cinque" Magee, longest-held U.S. political prisoner (1963-2023, Marin County Courthouse incident).

title: The Case of Silvia Baraldini (Audio)
description: April 16, 1991 audio program on the case of Italian anti-imperialist political prisoner Silvia Baraldini.

title: The Lexington Women's Control Unit — Part 1
description: Part 1 of a multi-part Freedom Archives video on the Lexington High Security Unit for women political prisoners.

title: The Lexington Women's Control Unit — Part 2
description: Part 2 of the Freedom Archives Lexington Women's Control Unit video series.

title: The Lexington Women's Control Unit — Part 3
description: Part 3 of the Freedom Archives Lexington Women's Control Unit video series.

title: The Struggle Within — 30th Anniversary of the Murder of George Jackson
description: 30th-anniversary audio program on the August 1971 killing of George Jackson at San Quentin.

title: What Is a Political Prisoner? / Definition of Political Prisoners (Audio)
description: Audio discussion defining "political prisoner" and the use of control units against PPs and POWs.
